rationale_top3:
Families come back to BIG4 Gold Coast year after year. Kids refuse to leave, parents actually relax, and the heated waterpark rivals anything on the Gold Coast. A resort pool, jumping pillow, flying fox, daily activity program and the Nibbles Café with poolside ordering round out the on-site experience. Movie World is a 3-minute drive from the front gate.

One thing to know: request sites toward the riverside or interior of the park to avoid highway noise on the M1 side.
rationale_honourable: Well-landscaped grounds balancing resort amenities with green spaces. Close to all major Gold Coast theme parks while maintaining a peaceful retreat atmosphere. Comprehensive dog facilities including daycare, wash stations, and off-leash areas.
water_fun: Massive heated waterpark with multiple slides and lifeguards
kids_play: Jumping pillow, flying fox, daily activities, train rides
pet_detail: Pet-friendly with dog park, dog wash facilities, and on-site doggy daycare available
best_for: This park is ideal for active families with children of all ages who want a full entertainment experience with water activities, organised kids' programs, and immediate access to Gold Coast theme parks while enjoying premium facilities and dining options.

rationale_top3:
Broadwater sits right on the water with waterfront sites, direct beach access and a genuine community feel. Free pancake breakfasts and daily swans keep families coming back for decades. Two heated pools, a jumping pillow, playground and a packed activity program including outdoor movies and kids disco nights keep everyone busy. The light rail connects you to the rest of the coast.

One thing to know: ask for waterfront or park-facing sites. No WiFi on site.
rationale_honourable: Direct Broadwater beach access and waterfront positioning. Good value considering the extensive facilities and entertainment program included.
water_fun: Two pools, heated in winter, waterfront beach access
kids_play: Jumping pillow, playground, games room, holiday activities
best_for: Best for families with young children who want a full-service waterfront park with organized activities, pristine facilities, and convenient access to Gold Coast theme parks and attractions.

rationale_top3: Exceptional waterfront location directly on Tallebudgera Creek with safe swimming areas and short walk to beach access. Outstanding family entertainment facilities including heated pool with fun slides, adults-only pool, and diverse water activity options. High cleanliness standards and positive guest sentiment with friendly staff and well-maintained amenities.
rationale_honourable: Convenient proximity to Burleigh Heads and Gold Coast attractions. Good site sizing for family camping needs. Reasonable value proposition with on-site food truck and holiday activities.
water_fun: Heated pools with slides plus safe creek swimming
kids_play: Water slides, playground, rental trikes and beach access
pet_detail: No dogs allowed - not pet friendly
best_for: Families with young children who want the freedom to move between pools, creek, and beach activities while enjoying clean facilities and a safe, well-maintained environment with plenty of entertainment options

park_name: NRMA Treasure Island Holiday Resort, Gold Coast
rationale_top3:
Treasure Island packs in multiple pools, water slides, a splash pad, jumping pillow and mini golf, with Dreamworld next door and Movie World minutes away. Facilities are well-maintained and consistently reliable.

One thing to know: sites run smaller than BIG4 and the park gets busy in school holidays. Book early for peak periods.
rationale_honourable: Good value given the extensive onsite facilities, quality bistro dining, and walking distance to major shopping and attractions despite compact site sizing.
water_fun: Multiple pools, waterslides, splash pad, heated spas
kids_play: Jumping pillow, playgrounds, daily activities, kids club
pet_detail: Pet friendly accommodation available in designated areas; dogs permitted in some sections with off-leash enclosure provided
best_for: Families with children under 12 who want entertainment-filled days without leaving the resort, prioritizing activities and convenience over beachfront location

rationale_top3: Exceptional cleanliness standards and immaculate presentation throughout the park Outstanding beach location with patrolled beach access just steps away from sites Hosts Bec and Pete provide exceptional service and regularly organised activities including pancake breakfasts, movie nights, and arts and crafts
rationale_honourable: Safe, family-friendly environment where children can ride scooters freely around the park Charming boutique park atmosphere with fairy garden and kids corner features Good old fashioned camping experience with strong community feel
water_fun: No pool; beach directly across the road
kids_play: Fairy garden, dinosaur area, manager-organised activities
best_for: Beach-loving families seeking a clean, well-managed, intimate park experience with exceptional hosts who create community through daily activities rather than fixed entertainment infrastructure

rationale_top3: Entertainment & Activities (18/20): Outstanding facilities including heated pool, jumping pillow, playground, and food trucks on site providing excellent family entertainment options Cleanliness & Amenities (13/15): Spotless facilities with regular cleaning schedules maintaining consistently high standards throughout the park Natural Environment (13/15): Lovely shady trees and abundant green space creating a relaxed, natural atmosphere with ample room for outdoor activities
rationale_honourable: Positive Guest Sentiment (13/15): Consistently praised for friendly and helpful staff, creating a welcoming atmosphere for all visitors Generous Site Sizing (9/10): Spacious sites providing comfort and privacy, particularly appreciated by guests travelling with pets and families
kids_play: Jumping pillow, small playground, open grassy areas
pet_detail: Dogs allowed with vaccination certificates required; complimentary dog wash token provided on arrival; dogs must be on leash at all times.
best_for: This park is best suited for pet-loving families who value location and cleanliness over extensive on-site entertainment, and appreciate a quieter, tree-filled setting within walking distance of beaches and cafes.

rationale_top3: Entertainment facilities including pool with shallow area and well-equipped games room score 15.0, providing excellent family-focused amenities Spotless cleanliness standards score 14.0, with consistently praised amenities and presentation creating a safe, tidy environment Strong nature accessibility score 13.0, with beach directly across the road offering coastal experiences without leaving the urban convenience
rationale_honourable: Positive sentiment score of 10.0 driven by friendly, helpful staff and well-maintained smoke-free environment that families appreciate for safety and comfort
water_fun: Nice pool with shallow area for toddlers
kids_play: Games room available, playground recently removed
best_for: Beach-loving families with young children who value cleanliness, convenience, and a smoke-free environment in a central Gold Coast location

rationale_top3: Prime beachfront location just 100m from South Burleigh beach with easy access to Burleigh National Park and coastal walks Exceptionally clean amenities and well-maintained facilities with friendly, helpful staff consistently praised by guests Spacious sites providing plenty of room for families and children to move around comfortably
rationale_honourable: Strong nature and entertainment offerings with kids' activities room and proximity to natural attractions, providing good value despite premium location
water_fun: No pool; beach across the road
kids_play: TV/rec room with games; kids roam
best_for: Families with young to school-aged children who want to spend their days at the beach, exploring Burleigh National Park, and enjoying the vibrant cafe and restaurant scene within easy walking distance

rationale_top3: Entertainment facilities score strongly with heated pool featuring a popular large waterslide that consistently delights children Prime Gold Coast location provides convenient access to shops, Miami markets, and major theme parks while maintaining affordable pricing Friendly staff and well-maintained sites create a welcoming atmosphere despite some facility age concerns
rationale_honourable: Positive guest sentiment reflects appreciation for the family-focused amenities and value proposition, particularly among return visitors who prioritize location and pool facilities over premium accommodation finishes
water_fun: Heated pool with massive waterslide thrills kids
kids_play: Multiple playgrounds including ninja course equipment
best_for: This park best suits families with young children who prioritize location, pool facilities, and value over pristine cleanliness and spacious sites.

rationale_top3: Cleanliness Score (11/20): Modern, well-maintained amenities and bathrooms consistently praised by guests Nature Score (10/20): Waterfront location providing direct access to boating and fishing opportunities Entertainment Score (8/20): Limited organized activities but coffee van on-site and proximity to water-based recreation
rationale_honourable: Sentiment Score (8/20): Generally positive guest experiences particularly among boating enthusiasts and pet owners who appreciate the dog-friendly facilities including off-leash area
water_fun: Netted swimming area, boat ramp nearby
kids_play: No dedicated playground, fishing and water activities
pet_detail: Dogs welcome with off-leash area, dog treats provided; recent policy change discontinued dogs in tents
best_for: Families with older children who enjoy fishing, boating, and water activities rather than those seeking structured entertainment and playgrounds for young kids
